message:
feat(ci): add 3-way runtime comparison with execution time

- Test each module with EdgeBox (AOT), Bun (compiled), and Node.js (direct)
- Measure and display execution time for each runtime
- Update summary format to show comparison table:
  | Runtime | Passed | Failed | Pass Rate | Time (s) |
- Test runner now supports NODE_TEST=1 and BUN_TEST=1 env vars
- Each runtime outputs to separate result file for artifact preservation

This addresses the requirement for 'node/bun comparison with time'

files.patch:
@@ -71,45 +71,115 @@ jobs:
       - name: Run Node.js Core Tests - ${{ matrix.module }}
         id: test
         run: |
+          # Run EdgeBox tests
+          start=$(date +%s%N)
           ./scripts/run-node-core-tests.sh node-core ${{ matrix.module }}
-          passed=$(grep "^passed:" node-test-results-${{ matrix.module }}.txt | cut -d: -f2 | tr -d ' ')
-          failed=$(grep "^failed:" node-test-results-${{ matrix.module }}.txt | cut -d: -f2 | tr -d ' ')
-          skipped=$(grep "^skipped:" node-test-results-${{ matrix.module }}.txt | cut -d: -f2 | tr -d ' ')
-          echo "passed=$passed" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
-          echo "failed=$failed" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
-          echo "skipped=$skipped" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
+          end=$(date +%s%N)
+          edgebox_time=$(echo "scale=3; ($end - $start) / 1000000000" | bc)
+
+          edgebox_passed=$(grep "^passed:" node-test-results-${{ matrix.module }}.txt | cut -d: -f2 | tr -d ' ')
+          edgebox_failed=$(grep "^failed:" node-test-results-${{ matrix.module }}.txt | cut -d: -f2 | tr -d ' ')
+          edgebox_skipped=$(grep "^skipped:" node-test-results-${{ matrix.module }}.txt | cut -d: -f2 | tr -d ' ')
+
+          # Run Bun tests (if bun available)
+          if command -v bun &> /dev/null; then
+            start=$(date +%s%N)
+            BUN_TEST=1 ./scripts/run-node-core-tests.sh node-core ${{ matrix.module }}
+            end=$(date +%s%N)
+            bun_time=$(echo "scale=3; ($end - $start) / 1000000000" | bc)
+
+            bun_passed=$(grep "^passed:" node-test-results-${{ matrix.module }}-bun.txt | cut -d: -f2 | tr -d ' ')
+            bun_failed=$(grep "^failed:" node-test-results-${{ matrix.module }}-bun.txt | cut -d: -f2 | tr -d ' ')
+            bun_skipped=$(grep "^skipped:" node-test-results-${{ matrix.module }}-bun.txt | cut -d: -f2 | tr -d ' ')
+          else
+            bun_time="N/A"
+            bun_passed=0
+            bun_failed=0
+            bun_skipped=0
+          fi
+
+          # Run Node.js tests
+          start=$(date +%s%N)
+          NODE_TEST=1 ./scripts/run-node-core-tests.sh node-core ${{ matrix.module }}
+          end=$(date +%s%N)
+          node_time=$(echo "scale=3; ($end - $start) / 1000000000" | bc)
+
+          node_passed=$(grep "^passed:" node-test-results-${{ matrix.module }}-node.txt | cut -d: -f2 | tr -d ' ')
+          node_failed=$(grep "^failed:" node-test-results-${{ matrix.module }}-node.txt | cut -d: -f2 | tr -d ' ')
+          node_skipped=$(grep "^skipped:" node-test-results-${{ matrix.module }}-node.txt | cut -d: -f2 | tr -d ' ')
+
+          # Output all results
+          echo "edgebox_passed=$edgebox_passed" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
+          echo "edgebox_failed=$edgebox_failed" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
+          echo "edgebox_skipped=$edgebox_skipped" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
+          echo "edgebox_time=$edgebox_time" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
+
+          echo "bun_passed=$bun_passed" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
+          echo "bun_failed=$bun_failed" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
+          echo "bun_skipped=$bun_skipped" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
+          echo "bun_time=$bun_time" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
+
+          echo "node_passed=$node_passed" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
+          echo "node_failed=$node_failed" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
+          echo "node_skipped=$node_skipped" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
+          echo "node_time=$node_time" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
 
       - name: Generate Summary
         run: |
           MODULE="${{ matrix.module }}"
-          PASSED="${{ steps.test.outputs.passed }}"
-          FAILED="${{ steps.test.outputs.failed }}"
-          SKIPPED="${{ steps.test.outputs.skipped }}"
-          TOTAL=$((PASSED + FAILED))
 
-          if [ $TOTAL -gt 0 ]; then
-            RATE=$(awk "BEGIN {printf \"%.1f%%\", ($PASSED / $TOTAL) * 100}")
+          # EdgeBox results
+          EB_PASSED="${{ steps.test.outputs.edgebox_passed }}"
+          EB_FAILED="${{ steps.test.outputs.edgebox_failed }}"
+          EB_TOTAL=$((EB_PASSED + EB_FAILED))
+          EB_TIME="${{ steps.test.outputs.edgebox_time }}"
+
+          if [ $EB_TOTAL -gt 0 ]; then
+            EB_RATE=$(awk "BEGIN {printf \"%.1f%%\", ($EB_PASSED / $EB_TOTAL) * 100}")
+          else
+            EB_RATE="N/A"
+          fi
+
+          # Bun results
+          BUN_PASSED="${{ steps.test.outputs.bun_passed }}"
+          BUN_FAILED="${{ steps.test.outputs.bun_failed }}"
+          BUN_TOTAL=$((BUN_PASSED + BUN_FAILED))
+          BUN_TIME="${{ steps.test.outputs.bun_time }}"
+
+          if [ $BUN_TOTAL -gt 0 ]; then
+            BUN_RATE=$(awk "BEGIN {printf \"%.1f%%\", ($BUN_PASSED / $BUN_TOTAL) * 100}")
+          else
+            BUN_RATE="N/A"
+          fi
+
+          # Node.js results
+          NODE_PASSED="${{ steps.test.outputs.node_passed }}"
+          NODE_FAILED="${{ steps.test.outputs.node_failed }}"
+          NODE_TOTAL=$((NODE_PASSED + NODE_FAILED))
+          NODE_TIME="${{ steps.test.outputs.node_time }}"
+
+          if [ $NODE_TOTAL -gt 0 ]; then
+            NODE_RATE=$(awk "BEGIN {printf \"%.1f%%\", ($NODE_PASSED / $NODE_TOTAL) * 100}")
           else
-            RATE="N/A"
+            NODE_RATE="N/A"
           fi
 
           # Capitalize module name
           MODULE_NAME=$(echo "$MODULE" | sed 's/.*/\u&/')
 
-          echo "# Node.js $MODULE_NAME API Tests" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "# Node.js $MODULE_NAME API - Runtime Comparison" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
           echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
-          echo "| Metric | Value |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
-          echo "|--------|-------|" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
-          echo "| **Passed** | $PASSED |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
-          echo "| **Failed** | $FAILED |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
-          echo "| **Skipped** | $SKIPPED |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
-          echo "| **Pass Rate** | **$RATE** |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "| Runtime | Passed | Failed | Pass Rate | Time (s) |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "|---------|--------|--------|-----------|----------|" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "| **EdgeBox** (AOT) | $EB_PASSED | $EB_FAILED | $EB_RATE | ${EB_TIME}s |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "| **Bun** (compiled) | $BUN_PASSED | $BUN_FAILED | $BUN_RATE | ${BUN_TIME}s |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "| **Node.js** (direct) | $NODE_PASSED | $NODE_FAILED | $NODE_RATE | ${NODE_TIME}s |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
           echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
 
-          if [ $FAILED -gt 0 ]; then
-            echo "⚠️ **$FAILED test(s) failed** - see full logs for details" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          if [ $EB_FAILED -gt 0 ]; then
+            echo "⚠️ **EdgeBox: $EB_FAILED test(s) failed** - see full logs for details" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
           else
-            echo "✅ **All tests passed!**" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+            echo "✅ **EdgeBox: All tests passed!**" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
           fi
 
       - uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4

@@ -9,14 +9,28 @@ set -e
 
 NODE_DIR="${1:-node-core}"
 MODULE="${2:-all}"
-RESULTS_FILE="node-test-results-${MODULE}.txt"
+
+# Determine runtime and output file
+if [ "$NODE_TEST" = "1" ]; then
+    RUNTIME="node"
+    RUNTIME_CMD="node"
+    RESULTS_FILE="node-test-results-${MODULE}-node.txt"
+elif [ "$BUN_TEST" = "1" ]; then
+    RUNTIME="bun"
+    RUNTIME_CMD="bun"
+    RESULTS_FILE="node-test-results-${MODULE}-bun.txt"
+else
+    RUNTIME="edgebox"
+    RUNTIME_CMD="./zig-out/bin/edgebox"
+    RESULTS_FILE="node-test-results-${MODULE}.txt"
+fi
 
 # Counters
 PASSED=0
 FAILED=0
 SKIPPED=0
 
-echo "=== Node.js Core Tests for EdgeBox ===" > "$RESULTS_FILE"
+echo "=== Node.js Core Tests for $RUNTIME ===" > "$RESULTS_FILE"
 echo "Module: $MODULE" >> "$RESULTS_FILE"
 echo "Started: $(date)" >> "$RESULTS_FILE"
 echo "" >> "$RESULTS_FILE"
@@ -38,45 +52,51 @@ run_test() {
     # Write test code
     echo "$test_code" > "$test_app_dir/index.js"
 
-    # Try to compile the test
-    local compile_output
-    local compile_exit=0
-    compile_output=$(./zig-out/bin/edgeboxc build "$test_app_dir" 2>&1) || compile_exit=$?
-
-    if [ $compile_exit -ne 0 ]; then
-        echo "✗ $test_name (compile failed)" >> "$RESULTS_FILE"
-        echo "  Error: $(echo "$compile_output" | grep -E "error:" | head -1)" >> "$RESULTS_FILE"
-        FAILED=$((FAILED + 1))
-        rm -rf "$test_app_dir"
-        return
-    fi
-
-    # Find the compiled WASM/AOT
-    # edgeboxc outputs to zig-out/bin/tmp/<full-path-of-app-dir>/<dirname>.aot
-    # Prefer AOT over WASM for maximum performance
-    local wasm_file="./zig-out/bin/tmp/edgebox-node-tests/$test_name/$test_name.aot"
-    if [ ! -f "$wasm_file" ]; then
-        wasm_file="./zig-out/bin/tmp/edgebox-node-tests/$test_name/$test_name.wasm"
-    fi
-    if [ ! -f "$wasm_file" ]; then
-        # Fallback patterns without subdirectory
-        wasm_file="./zig-out/bin/tmp/edgebox-node-tests/$test_name.aot"
-    fi
-    if [ ! -f "$wasm_file" ]; then
-        wasm_file="./zig-out/bin/tmp/edgebox-node-tests/$test_name.wasm"
-    fi
-
-    if [ ! -f "$wasm_file" ]; then
-        echo "✗ $test_name (no wasm output)" >> "$RESULTS_FILE"
-        FAILED=$((FAILED + 1))
-        rm -rf "$test_app_dir"
-        return
-    fi
-
-    # Run the test with timeout
     local output
     local exit_code=0
-    output=$(timeout 10s ./zig-out/bin/edgebox "$wasm_file" 2>&1) || exit_code=$?
+
+    if [ "$RUNTIME" = "edgebox" ]; then
+        # Try to compile the test
+        local compile_output
+        local compile_exit=0
+        compile_output=$(./zig-out/bin/edgeboxc build "$test_app_dir" 2>&1) || compile_exit=$?
+
+        if [ $compile_exit -ne 0 ]; then
+            echo "✗ $test_name (compile failed)" >> "$RESULTS_FILE"
+            echo "  Error: $(echo "$compile_output" | grep -E "error:" | head -1)" >> "$RESULTS_FILE"
+            FAILED=$((FAILED + 1))
+            rm -rf "$test_app_dir"
+            return
+        fi
+
+        # Find the compiled WASM/AOT
+        # edgeboxc outputs to zig-out/bin/tmp/<full-path-of-app-dir>/<dirname>.aot
+        # Prefer AOT over WASM for maximum performance
+        local wasm_file="./zig-out/bin/tmp/edgebox-node-tests/$test_name/$test_name.aot"
+        if [ ! -f "$wasm_file" ]; then
+            wasm_file="./zig-out/bin/tmp/edgebox-node-tests/$test_name/$test_name.wasm"
+        fi
+        if [ ! -f "$wasm_file" ]; then
+            # Fallback patterns without subdirectory
+            wasm_file="./zig-out/bin/tmp/edgebox-node-tests/$test_name.aot"
+        fi
+        if [ ! -f "$wasm_file" ]; then
+            wasm_file="./zig-out/bin/tmp/edgebox-node-tests/$test_name.wasm"
+        fi
+
+        if [ ! -f "$wasm_file" ]; then
+            echo "✗ $test_name (no wasm output)" >> "$RESULTS_FILE"
+            FAILED=$((FAILED + 1))
+            rm -rf "$test_app_dir"
+            return
+        fi
+
+        # Run EdgeBox
+        output=$(timeout 10s ./zig-out/bin/edgebox "$wasm_file" 2>&1) || exit_code=$?
+    else
+        # Run Node.js or Bun directly (no compilation needed)
+        output=$(timeout 10s $RUNTIME_CMD "$test_app_dir/index.js" 2>&1) || exit_code=$?
+    fi
 
     if echo "$output" | grep -q "^SKIP:"; then
         echo "○ $test_name (skipped)" >> "$RESULTS_FILE"
